title: crambe orientalis subsp. sulphurea
intro: Crambe orientalis subsp. sulphurea, also known as yellow sea rocket, is a plant species within the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crambe orientalis subsp. sulphurea include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
